backend: custom MLX LoRA loop with TRUE per-example weighted next-token CE (loss = sum_i w_i*CE_i / sum_i w_i); NOT replication

result.summary: weighted correct 1.0 vs uniform 0.45-0.55 (delta +0.45/+0.55) on 2 seeds -- true per-example loss weighting beats the earlier replication proxy (0.95/0.50).

gateVerdict: STRENGTHENED but STAYS OPEN. Gate parts (a) weighted>uniform, (b) influence~LOO, (c) no register collapse all hold on the controlled conflict. BUT the 'held-out suite' is the SAME 20 invented facts used in training (in-sample memorization of which SOURCE won, NOT held-out generalization to unseen facts); N=20; influence validated via LOO only (model-free proxy, not a real TracIn/influence-function backend). Provenance-weighting cannot show held-out generalization via fact-memorization, so this direction needs a task where the weighting PATTERN transfers to unseen items.
